updates.title: Gold at $10,000, Silver at $200? Rich Dad Poor Dad author Robert Kiyosaki says stock market crash is imminent
updates.summary: Kiyosaki, referencing Jim Rickards, predicts significant price increases for gold and silver amid concerns over global debt and inflation. His comments highlight a growing belief among investors that traditional currencies may face challenges, prompting a shift towards hard assets.
